final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    output reg [15:0] result
);integer i; // Declare the index variable 'i'

always @(*) begin
    result = 0;
    for (i = 0; i < 8; i = i + 1) begin
        if (a[i] == 1) begin
            result = result + (b << i);
        end
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (a[0]) begin
        result = result - (b << 0);
      end
      if (a[1]) begin
        result = result - (b << 1);
      end
      if (a[2]) begin
        result = result - (b << 2);
      end
      if (a[3]) begin
        result = result - (b << 3);
      end
      if (a[4]) begin
        result = result - (b << 4);
      end
      if (a[5]) begin
        result = result - (b << 5);
      end
      if (a[6]) begin
        result = result - (b << 6);
      end
      if (a[7]) begin
        result = result - (b << 7);
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
